chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-513 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 4479/25 2.For hearing of main case 13-11-2025 None present for the applicant. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the applicant, which shows that the applicant and his counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
